# Third-party archives

Place private or license-restricted third-party archives here locally. Do not commit Autodesk/ODA DWF Toolkit source archives to a public repository unless you have confirmed the redistribution rights.

Expected local filenames:

```text
DWFToolkit-7.7-src-ODA.zip
DWFToolkit-7.7-src-ODA-essential.tar.gz
```

Import example:

```bash
./scripts/setup-oda-dwftoolkit.sh third_party/archives/DWFToolkit-7.7-src-ODA.zip
```
